title: Hamilton declared title threat as Mercedes face major problem
summary:
Join RacingNews365's Samuel Coop and Nick Golding as they look back on last weekend's Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix! Lewis Hamilton's first win for Ferrari is a major talking point, as is the fact Mercedes view him as a serious threat for the F1 drivers' title.

Also in this week's podcast, Mercedes' growing reliability issue is discussed following Kimi Antonelli's painful late Barcelona retirement, as is whether Charles Leclerc is starting to feel the pressure at Ferrari and if Red Bull are set for a lonely season. The duo also have a crucial FIA Monaco debate!
